rulings.Case Title: ARTURO ROMERO VS. WILLIAM SCRANTON III ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement, Mutual Release And Stipulation For Dismissal/Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 18, 2016, Line 4. PLAINTIFF ARTURO ROMERO Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement, Mutual Release And Stipulation For Dismissal/Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant breached the stipulation by failing to remove his personal property from the premises. Plaintiff is not responsible for storing the property under the agreement. Plaintiff is relieved from further obligations under the Settlement agreement. Plaintiff is entitled to recover waived rent and daily damages in the amount of $2,379.33. Plaintiff is also entitled to recover enforcement attorney's fees in the amount of $5,304.97. (Defendant did not oppose the amount requested). All other claimed damages such as waste and excessive wear and tear are not recoverable in this action. See Settlement Agreement paragraph 6. =(501/REQ)
